title: Can Cooking Destroy Nutrients?

scenes.text: Are nutrients lost when cooking? Find out now!
scenes.hook_top: COOKING AND NUTRIENTS FACT OR MYTH
scenes.label: MYTH: Cooking Destroys Nutrients

scenes.text: Many think that cooking always destroys vitamins and minerals.
scenes.label: MYTH: Cooking Always Harms Nutrients

scenes.text: In truth, some cooking methods can actually enhance nutrient absorption, like cooking tomatoes increasing lycopene availability.
scenes.label: TRUTH: Cooking Can Enhance Absorption

scenes.text: Follow if your body is worth 60 seconds a day.

description: Can cooking really destroy nutrients? Explore how different cooking methods impact your food's health benefits. Follow us for more insights!
